recalls.Description:
Lola + The Boys has issued a recall for five styles of youth hooded clothing featuring drawstrings, which pose a serious strangulation hazard. These items include the Candy Heart Tie Dye set, the Hoodie Unicorn Tutu set, the Justice League Hero hoodie, the Emoji Love hoodie, and the Crystal Rainbow Rain hoodie. The clothing is available in youth sizes 1 through 12, with the brand name and size indicated on the neck label.

Parents are urged to remove these items from children immediately due to the risk of injury or death. The recalled clothing violates federal safety standards for children's outerwear and presents a significant safety concern.
recalls.Title: Lola + The Boys Recalls Youth Hooded Clothing with Drawstrings Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For more information, contact Lola + The Boys at 312-285-6053 from 10 a.m. to 5 p.m. CT, Monday through Friday, email customerservice@lolaandtheboys.com, or visit https://lolaandtheboys.com/pages/recall. You can also find details under the 'Recall Policy' section at the bottom of their homepage.

Images.Caption: Recalled Lola + The Boys Candy Heart Tie Dye Set
Recalled Lola + The Boys Hoodie Unicorn Tutu Set
Recalled Lola + The Boys Justice League Hero Gray Hoodie
Recalled Lola + The Boys Emoji Love Hoodie
Recalled Lola + The Boys Crystal Rainbow Rain Hoodie

Retailers.Name: Available at Lola + The Boys stores nationwide and online at Lolaandtheboys.com from November 2022 through September 2025, priced between $45 and $80.

Importers.Name: Lola Plus The Boys Inc., of Chicago, Illinois

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard due to drawstrings in the clothing

Remedies.Name: Remove drawstrings and contact for a full refund

recalls.metaDescription: Lola + The Boys recalls youth hooded clothing with drawstrings due to serious strangulation risks. Immediate action required for safety.

recalls.Description: Grundens is recalling the Youth Clipper 282 Jacket and Youth Zenith 282 Jacket, available in youth sizes 8 to 12. These jackets feature a drawstring in the hood and have "Grundens" printed on the left chest. The Clipper jacket is orange, while the Zenith jacket comes in orange, navy, and camouflage. Each jacket includes a black label inside that displays the brand name and country of origin in white text.
recalls.Title: Grundens Recalls Youth Jackets Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact Grundens at 800-323-7327 from 8 a.m. to 4 p.m. PT Monday through Thursday, and from 8 a.m. to 12 p.m. on Friday. You can also email recall@Grundens.com or visit https://grundens.com/pages/recall for further details.

Products.Name: Youth Clipper 282 Jacket
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 8,850 (In addition, about 730 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: "Grundens" is printed on the label inside the jacket

Retailers.Name: Available at Bass Pro Shops and other outdoor retailers nationwide, as well as on Grundens.com from August 2015 through August 2025, priced between $55 and $120.

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard due to drawstring in the hood

Remedies.Name: Remove drawstrings and return for a full refund or upload a photo for a partial store credit

recalls.metaDescription: Grundens recalls Youth Clipper and Zenith jackets due to a strangulation hazard. Learn how to participate in the recall for a refund or credit.

recalls.Description: AFTCO is recalling its Youth Solitude Rain Jackets, available in youth sizes XS to L. These jackets are made from waterproof nylon and feature a retractable drawstring in the hood, along with the AFTCO logo prominently displayed on the front. The internal label includes the company's logo, size, care instructions, fiber content, and country of origin. The model number for these jackets is BJ05, and they come in sizes XS (5-6), S (6-7), M (8-10), and L (10-12).
recalls.Title: AFTCO Recalls Youth Solitude Jackets Due to Strangulation Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: For assistance, contact AFTCO at 877-489-4278 from 7 a.m. to 3:30 p.m. PT, Monday through Friday, via email at recall@aftco.com, or visit www.aftco.com/recall for further details.

Images.Caption: The label inside of the recalled AFTCO Youth Solitude Jacket

Retailers.Name: Available online at www.aftco.com and at various fishing, camping, and outdoor equipment retailers across the U.S. from November 2018 through August 2024, priced between $80 and $100.

Importers.Name: AFTCO Mfg. Co., of Santa Ana, California

Hazards.Name: Strangulation hazard due to drawstring in the hood

Remedies.Name: Remove drawstrings, return for a refund, or submit a photo for a gift card

recalls.metaDescription: AFTCO recalls Youth Solitude Jackets due to a strangulation hazard. Learn how to participate in the recall for a refund or gift card.

recalls.Description: TJX has issued a recall for Tommy Bahama brand children's brown stretch twill pants that come with ribbed cuffs and a drawstring. These pants were sold as part of a set featuring either a blue or green fleece crewneck top adorned with an embroidered winking smiley face on the left shoulder. The recall affects pants in sizes ranging from 18M to 5T, identified by the label 'Suzhou Megatex Import And Export' and style number CP08513. Only the pants from these sets are included in the recall.
recalls.Title: TJX Recalls Tommy Bahama Children's Pants Sets Due to Choking Hazard; Available Exclusively at Marshalls
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should immediately contact TJX at 888-627-7425 between 9 a.m. and 6 p.m. ET, Monday through Friday. Additional information can be found online at https://www.marshalls.com/us/store/jump/topic/Find-Help/Our-Product/6500006p#productrecalls or by visiting Marshalls.com and selecting 'Product Recalls' at the bottom of the page. Customers can also reach out via email at customerservice@tjx.com.

Products.Name: Tommy Bahama Children's Pants Set
Products.NumberOfUnits: About 14,500 (In addition, about 720 were sold in Canada)

Images.Caption: Recalled Pants with Green Crewneck Top
Recalled Pants with Green Crewneck Top
Recalled Pants with Blue Crewneck Top
Recalled Pants with Blue Crewneck Top

Retailers.Name: Marshalls stores across the nation from December 2023 through February 2024, priced at $13 for the set with the green top and $15 for the set with the blue top.

Importers.Name: The TJX Companies Inc., of Framingham, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Choking hazard due to loose plastic pieces on faux drawstrings.

Remedies.Name: Immediately remove the recalled pants from children and cut off the faux drawstrings. Consumers can contact TJX for guidance on how to destroy the pants and receive a full refund, or return the pants to any Marshalls store for a complete refund.

recalls.metaDescription: TJX recalls Tommy Bahama children's pants sets due to choking hazard. Contact TJX for refunds or return to Marshalls stores.
